name: league-shop-base

metadata.name: league-shop-base
metadata.summary: Base models and admin for league-shop

methods.name: lsb.list_filters.AccountTypeListFilter.lookups
documentation:
Returns a list of tuples. The first element in each
tuple is the coded value for the option that will
appear in the URL query. The second element is the
human-readable name for the option that will appear
in the right sidebar.

methods.name: lsb.list_filters.AccountTypeListFilter.queryset
documentation:
Returns the filtered queryset based on the value
provided in the query string and retrievable via
`self.value()`.

documentation: Parse top sold skin value from provided setting
